items.title: Robbyant Releases LingBot-VLA 2.0: An Open-Source 6B Vision-Language-Action (VLA) Model for Cross-Embodiment Robot Manipulation
items.summary: Ant Group's Robbyant has released LingBot-VLA 2.0, an Apache-2.0 vision-language-action model for cross-embodiment robot manipulation. The 6B checkpoint is pretrained on roughly 60,000 hours of data, spanning 50,000 hours of robot trajectories...
